_note: Spec Appendix A verbatim (source of truth for what the weekly rhythm reviews; Riché may strike/edit before seeding — treat as the spec until he does). relatedFeatureKeys reference data/feature-taxonomy.json. metric 14 (Feature Portfolio Health) is DERIVED from the taxonomy's health_state distribution, not from generated observations. `unit` governs display formatting on the Metrics screen (percent/ratio/days/minutes/count/points/index) — it is explicit rather than inferred from the value's magnitude, since a card's headline value is a mean across features and count/delta metrics can coincidentally land in the same numeric range as a genuine ratio.

metrics.name: Feature Adoption Rate
metrics.definition: % of entitled accounts with ≥1 qualified event within the feature's rhythm window
metrics.actionTrigger: Adoption <60% of class baseline 2 consecutive windows → "underused" tag, owning PM writes adoption hypothesis

metrics.name: Engagement (WAU/MAU)
metrics.definition: WAU/MAU stickiness ratio, generated per-feature for daily-ops and weekly-review rhythm classes only (variable-rhythm features are judged by Usage Frequency instead); the card's headline value is the mean across those features, serving as the product-level view this metric is meant to give.
metrics.actionTrigger: Stickiness down 15%+ over 4 weeks → engagement review, checked against last release and seasonality

metrics.name: Usage Frequency
metrics.definition: Median days-between-uses vs the feature's rhythm-class baseline
metrics.actionTrigger: Interval >2x baseline → dormancy watch before any "dead" verdict

metrics.name: Task Completion Rate
metrics.definition: % of feature sessions reaching the defined value action

metrics.name: Time on Task
metrics.definition: Median time to complete the value action
metrics.actionTrigger: p50 +20% vs 4-week avg → regression check against last release

metrics.name: Activation Rate (D7/D30/D90)
metrics.definition: % of entitled accounts hitting value action within 7/30/90 days of GA
metrics.actionTrigger: D30 <25% → shipped-not-adopted tag, enters enablement queue or CCB

metrics.name: Time to Adoption
metrics.definition: Days from GA to 10% adoption, trailing 8 weeks of releases
metrics.actionTrigger: >30 days → enablement gap review with PMM

metrics.name: Friction Index
metrics.definition: Rage clicks + errors + tagged support tickets per 100 active accounts
metrics.actionTrigger: Weekly top 3 get named owner + first action at Monday standup

metrics.name: AI Containment Rate
metrics.definition: % of AI-agent outputs accepted without human edit; escalation rate
metrics.actionTrigger: Acceptance <70% → prompt/eval review; failures logged to eval set

metrics.name: Feature NPS
metrics.definition: Feature-active user NPS vs company baseline
metrics.actionTrigger: Feature NPS 10+ below company → verbatims auto-clustered into theme brief

metrics.name: Churn Risk Watchlist
metrics.definition: Renewal-window accounts falling below rhythm on top retention-driver features
metrics.actionTrigger: Tier-1 drop → CSM play triggered in Gainsight, logged

metrics.name: Expansion PQLs
metrics.definition: Accounts hitting entitlement ceilings or previewing gated modules
metrics.actionTrigger: Threshold crossed → routed to AE, tracked to pipeline created

metrics.name: Feature Revenue Concentration
metrics.definition: Features with adoption <10% concentrated in top-decile ARR accounts
metrics.actionTrigger: Kill candidate with tier-1 concentration → account-flagged review before CCB

metrics.name: Feature Portfolio Health
metrics.definition: Feature count per health state; reclassified monthly, movers weekly
metrics.actionTrigger: Shipped-not-adopted 2+ quarters, or legacy <2% adoption with no tier-1 dependency → forced CCB kill/invest decision
